section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor will lift the patient's right leg.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a component of the physical exam (straight leg raise-type maneuver), not a future management plan or order. Documenting it in the plan could mislead a reader about what has already been examined versus what is being recommended.

Continuing an existing medication is a management decision and belongs in the Plan, but per the template rules, current medications the patient is already taking generally belong in S unless framed clearly as a treatment change. This sentence straddles both; it is acceptable in P but could be clearer as an explicit continuation order.
